description:
Qwen-Image (20B) is an image generation foundation model in the Qwen series that achieves significant advances in complex text rendering. 

Optional parameters:
Aspect ratio. Valid aspect ratios are 16:9, 4:3, 1:1, 3:4, 9:16. 
Negative_prompt to set the negative prompt.
